"JUDGMENT DEBTOR FRANCISCO LEON SHALL MAKE MONTHLY PAYMENTS TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR SAIDA BARRAGAN-GARCIA IN THE AMOUNT OF $150.00. THE FIRST PAYMENT IS DUE ON OR BEFORE JANUARY 15, 2013. EACH SUBSEQUENT MONTHLY PAYMENT IS DUE ON OR BEFORE THE 15TH OF THE MONTH. CASE SET FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON MARCH 04, 2013 AT 11:00AM", PER JUDGE MILEFF. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES.PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER--SABRINA RIVERA. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER--CARLOS MARTINEZ. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-29-2014 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-18-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506.
